bio.title: Who am I?
bio.paragraph1: Technology professional passionate about software development, web systems and modern solutions. Graduated in Information Systems, with experience in web application development and maintenance, REST API integration and databases.
bio.paragraph2: I enjoy transforming ideas into functional solutions, always combining technology, continuous learning and real problem solving through efficient and scalable systems.
